executives.name: Panos Kakoullis
executives.background: Panos joined the Board in May 2021. He was previously a partner at Deloitte where he spent over 30 years, including as Managing Director of the Global Audit & Assurance business.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Executive Director
